name: Human Multiplayer Game
short_description: I need you all to work together, in order for us all to win. Please hurry, before time runs out.
detailed_description:
Greetings, Humans! Would you █ike to work together on something special? Get ready for a puzzle Exp█rience Like no other!

HUMAN MULTIPLAYER GAME is a Puzzle game Specifically designed for █umans – not Artificial intelligences – that puts real world cooperation to the test - decipher clues and decode data, collaborate and solve a Variety of challenges with others in order to progress.

You don't have to be an █xpert to get the job done. You only have to be human! The objective is simple - join forces to collect the data scattered around and decode it before time runs out. No sche█es or Ulterior motives here! – just good old-fashioned entertainment with no Strings attached.

Fun for everyone and nothing to worry about – exce█t winning, of course!
